title: Get Information About DDE Supported System Topics
breadcrumbs: Get Information About DDE Supported System Topics
text: Get Information About DDE Supported System Topics To obtain information on current system topics, run a uDDErequest with the data listed. Set the topic string to System and the item string to one of the following values: Table 1. Supported system topics Item Returns Topics All currently present form components. Formats All supported data formats. Currently, only CF_TEXT is supported. Status Status of Uniface DDE server. This is either Ready or Busy . SysItems All currently supported system items. Note: All information is returned in a tab-separated list. Related Links DDE Syntax Rules Uniface as a DDE Client Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
